freshness.staleReason: Curated company intel snapshot is 9 day(s) old. Live feeds may be partial while direct sources are still being connected/stabilized.

headlines.title: Weekly Summary Alert for Abivax
headlines.summary: added the following items during the week of February 23, 2026 News Ab

headlines.title: Abivax announced ECCO 2026 data highlighting first evidence of anti-fibrotic activity for obefazimod alongside additional clinical efficacy and safety analyses in IBD.
headlines.summary: IR email alert plus SEC 6-K filing (2026-02-23) confirm ECCO 2026 anti-fibrotic / efficacy / safety announcement.
headlines.impact: Reinforces clinical momentum and increases executive focus on readiness, controls, and ERP execution discipline ahead of upcoming milestones.

headlines.title: Abivax focuses on developing therapeutics to stabilize immune response in chronic inflammatory diseases, with obefazimod as lead for ulcerative colitis.
headlines.summary: Develops therapeutics to stabilize immune response in chronic inflammatory diseases.
headlines.impact: Targeted pipeline reduces ERP execution risk.

headlines.title: Leadership includes CEO Marc de Garidel, CFO Didier Blondel, CMO Fabio Cataldi, and others with pharma experience.
headlines.summary: Marc de Garidel CEO, Didier Blondel CFO, Fabio Cataldi CMO.
headlines.impact: Experienced team aids strategic ERP management.

headlines.title: CEO Marc de Garidel dismissed Eli Lilly bid rumors as 'noise' on 2026-01-20, stating there was no discussion on the acquisition and declining comment on informal talks.
headlines.summary: The noise around this potential acquisition is a distraction, but our duty is not to be distracted.
headlines.sourceTitle: Abivax CEO dismisses 'noise' around rumored Eli Lilly bid
headlines.impact: Confirmed leadership messaging lowers rumor-driven distraction but does not prove absence of informal interest.

headlines.title: Prepare contingencies for M&A amid Lilly rumors.
headlines.summary: CEO dismisses rumored Eli Lilly bid.
headlines.sourceTitle: Abivax CEO dismisses 'noise' around rumored Eli Lilly bid
headlines.impact: May adjust operating model for integration.

headlines.title: Stock surged on M&A rumors, with speculated $15B valuation.
headlines.summary: Shares soar on media report of Eli Lilly bid.
headlines.sourceTitle: France denies contact with Eli Lilly
